creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 239365
Patch for libopenmpt

* Make openmpt123 optional to avoid pulling in unnecessary dependencies
* Reduce options to simplify port and reduce dependency options
* Drop "+release.autotools" from version name and .pc file
* Enable "make test"

Changelog: https://lib.openmpt.org/libopenmpt/2023/01/08/releases-0.6.7-0.5.21-0.4.33-0.3.41/

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)
